evals.prompt: 帮我确认 Geom-GCN 这篇论文具体是哪篇，最好给出 canonical 标题、URL 和 title_slug。
evals.expected_output: Resolve the fuzzy paper reference into a canonical paper identity without requiring DOI.
expectations: The output includes a canonical title containing 'Geom-GCN' or 'Geometric Graph Convolutional Networks'
The output includes a title_slug field
The output includes a canonical_url or identity.canonical_url
No PDF is downloaded during this resolution

evals.prompt: 这个 OpenReview 链接对应的是哪篇论文？请先把论文身份确认下来，不要急着下载。https://openreview.net/forum?id=SkgBfaNKPr
evals.expected_output: Resolve an OpenReview-only paper identity and avoid requiring a DOI or final venue.
expectations: The output resolves the OpenReview URL to a paper identity
The output includes an OpenReview identifier in the identity or identifiers
The output does not require a DOI to succeed
No PDF is downloaded during this resolution
The output indicates the paper may be under review or submitted, not necessarily published

evals.prompt: 把 Attention Is All You Need 这篇论文定位清楚，如果本地已有 raw 就直接复用。
evals.expected_output: Prefer local raw bundle reuse before doing network-based resolution.
expectations: The output checks ~/papers for existing bundles first
If a local bundle exists, it is reused without network resolution
The output includes a canonical title
If local bundle is reused, the evidence mentions local reuse
